zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Badlesmere於1313年出生在英國肯特巴德萊斯莫時，她的父親Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere38歲，母親Margaret de Clare26歲。她於1316年6月27日與Sir Edmund Mortimer在英國史洛普爾金萊特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1356年6月8日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦布拉可福利亞斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Badlesmere于1313年出生在英国肯特巴德萊斯莫时，她的父亲Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere38岁，母亲Margaret de Clare26岁。她于1316年6月27日与Sir Edmund Mortimer在英国史洛普爾金萊特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1356年6月8日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦布拉可福利亞斯。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Badlesmere was born in 1313, in Badlesmere, Kent, England, her father, Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere, was 38 and her mother, Margaret de Clare, was 26. She married Sir Edmund Mortimer on 27 June 1316, in Kinlet, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 8 June 1356, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in Blackfriars, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Badlesmere est née en 1313, à Badlesmere, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Clare, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edmund Mortimer le 27 juin 1316, à Kinlet, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 8 juin 1356, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Blackfriars, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Badlesmere 1313 in Badlesmere, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere 38 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Clare 26. Sie hat am 27. Juni 1316 in Kinlet, Shropshire, England Sir Edmund Mortimer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 8. Juni 1356 im Alter von 43 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in Blackfriars, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Badlesmere è nata il nel 1313 nel Badlesmere, Kent, England, sua padre, Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Clare, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Edmund Mortimer il 27 giugno 1316, nel Kinlet, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 8 giugno 1356, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Blackfriars, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Badlesmereが1313年にイギリスケントバドレスメアで生まれた時，父Sir Bartholomew Badlesmereは38歳，母Margaret de Clareは26歳であった。1316年6月27日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアキンレットでSir Edmund Mortimerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1356年6月8日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンブラクフリアルズにて埋葬された。

ko.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 스탠턴 업 이인 히스
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Badlesmere(이)가 1313년 영국 켄트 바들레스머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Clare(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1316년 6월 27일 영국 슈럽실르 킨렛에서 Sir Edmund Mortimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1356년 6월 8일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 블랙프리아르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Badlesmere nasceu em 1313, em Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Clare, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Edmund Mortimer em 27 de junho de 1316, em Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 8 de junho de 1356, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Blackfriars, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: стантон упон хаин хит, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Badlesmere родилась в 1313 г. в местности бадлесмир, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Clare, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edmund Mortimer 27 июня 1316 г. в местности кинлет, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 8 июня 1356 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности блэккфрярс, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Badlesmere nació en 1313, en Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Margaret de Clare, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Edmund Mortimer el 27 de junio de 1316, en Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de junio de 1356, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Blackfriars, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
